headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Targa Resources, Raises Price Target to $300
summary: Mizuho  analyst Gabriel Moreen   maintains Targa Resources (NYSE:TRGP) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $260 to $300.

raw.headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Targa Resources, Raises Price Target to $300

headline: Q1 2026 Midstream/MLP Buybacks: Steady Start To Year
summary: Quarterly equity repurchases for midstream MLPs and corporations remained healthy in Q1. Six constituents in the broad Alerian Midstream Energy Index spent a combined $818 mln on repurchases

raw.headline: Q1 2026 Midstream/MLP Buybacks: Steady Start To Year
